title: Slope–Intercept Form
aria_label: y equals m times x plus b
notes: m is the slope — the rate at which y changes for every 1-unit increase in x.
b is the y-intercept — the value of y when x = 0 (where the line crosses the y-axis).
This is the most common form for graphing a line quickly.
To graph: plot (0, b), then use slope m = rise/run to find a second point.
If an equation is not in this form, solve for y to reveal m and b.

examples.description: Identify slope and y-intercept of y = 2x − 3.

applications: Graphing lines by hand using slope and y-intercept.
Interpreting linear models: the slope is the unit rate, and b is the starting value.
Writing equations from graphs by reading m and b directly.

es.title: Forma Pendiente-Intercepto
notes: m es la pendiente — la tasa a la que y cambia por cada aumento de 1 unidad en x.
b es el intercepto en y — el valor de y cuando x = 0.
Esta es la forma más común para graficar una línea rápidamente.
Para graficar: traza (0, b), luego usa m = sube/corre para encontrar un segundo punto.
Si una ecuación no está en esta forma, despeja y para revelar m y b.

examples.description: Identifica pendiente e intercepto de y = 2x − 3.

ht.title: Fòm Pant-Entèsèpsyon
notes: m se pant la — vitès chanjman y pou chak ogmantasyon 1 inite nan x.
b se entèsèpsyon-y la — valè y lè x = 0.
Sa se fòm ki pi komen pou trace yon liy rapidman.
Pou trace: mete (0, b), apre itilize m = monte/kouri pou jwenn yon dezyèm pwen.
Si yon ekwasyon pa nan fòm sa a, rezoud pou y pou wè m ak b.

examples.description: Idantifye pant ak entèsèpsyon nan y = 2x − 3.
